react-bun-ssr

react-bun-ssr is a Bun-native SSR React framework. It focuses on file-based routing, loaders and actions, streaming SSR, deferred data, client transitions, markdown routes, and a Bun-first runtime and build pipeline.

Primary docs
- Docs home: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs
- Quick start: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/start/quick-start
- Overview: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/start/overview
- File-based routing: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/routing/file-based-routing
- Loaders: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/data/loaders
- Head and meta: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/rendering/head-meta
- Deployment on Bun: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/deployment/bun-deployment
- API overview: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/api/overview
- Package API: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/api/react-bun-ssr
- Route API: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/docs/api/react-bun-ssr-route

Project links
- GitHub: https://github.com/react-formation/react-bun-ssr
- Blog: https://react-bun-ssr.dev/blog
